name: Water Sort Master
description: Water Sort Master is the ultimate liquid puzzle game! Test your brain with 6 unique game modes, including Classic, Time Trial, and Mystery. Sort the colored liquids until each flask contains only one color. Featuring thousands of levels, unlockable themes, and helpful power-ups like Undo and Extra Flasks. Features: 6 Game Modes: Classic, Time Trial, Limited Moves, Sequence, Mystery, and Fusion. Over 1000 unique levels. Unlockable themes and bottle styles. Smooth animations and relaxing sound effects. Play on Mobile or Desktop.
instructions: Use the mouse or touch to play Tap a flask to pick up the top liquid Tap another flask to pour it Rule You can only pour liquid onto the same color or into an empty flask
